definitions.text: framstille noe bedre enn det er
definitions.translation: present something as better than it is
dress up the bride, dress up the pig

examples.no: fylkeskommunen velger å pynte liket for å spare penger
examples.en: the county council chooses to dress up the corpse to save money

examples.no: megleren sørget for å sminke liket før salget
examples.en: the realtor made sure to dress up the corpse before the sale
